title: 32-bit support?
author: obscenelyvague
body:
Newer MMKV library dropped 32-bit support so app crashes at launch on a MT6737T device.
>com.tencent.mmkv.UnsupportedArchitectureException,MMKV 2.0+ requires 64-bit App, use 1.3.x instead.

Would you be open to having a product flavor for 32-bit with downgraded library?

title: After updating to v26.05, received SMS no longer shows SIM card information
author: seiuneko
body:
**Description**  
After upgrading to version 26.05, forwarded messages for received SMS no longer display which SIM card received the message, making it impossible to distinguish between SIM 1 and SIM 2.

**Message Template (default, unmodified)**  
```
[{{SIM}}接收短信]
发件人: {{From}}
内容: {{Content}}
```

**Actual Received Message**  
```
[接收短信]
发件人: 10086910
内容: 【验证密码】656057，尊敬的用户，您的号码正在一个新设备上登录中国移动 APP，该验证码5分钟内有效。请勿泄露或转发他人，谨防被骗。【中国移动】
```
As shown, the title only shows `[接收短信]`, and the `{{SIM}}` variable is not replaced.

**Expected Received Message**  
```
[SIM1(移动) 接收短信]
发件人: 10086910
内容: 【验证密码】656057，尊敬的用户，您的号码正在一个新设备上登录中国移动 APP，该验证码5分钟内有效。请勿泄露或转发他人，谨防被骗。【中国移动】
```
The template should be parsed correctly and display the corresponding SIM card information.

**Environment**  
- Version: 26.05

title: PLEASE ADD INSTRUCTIONS
author: qmnb12

title: Using DNS over HTTPS(DOH)無法直接turn off
author: kenc26-kh
body:
OS: Android 8.1.0
App Version: 202512240706-nightly-0b5fbd98
症狀：一開始是正常的，設備平時都插電開著，但過了幾天(挺神奇的），log顯示DNS無法正確解析api.telegram.org (UnknownHostException)，且Using DNS over HTTPS是被強制開啟。
即便完全清除資料及快取後重新安裝，Using DNS over HTTPS(DOH)預設都是開啟的，無法關閉。
查了一下repo原始碼，看起來是有設定proxy的話，DOH功能就會強制開啟無法關閉，但實際上我並沒設定proxy，後來點一下進去proxy設定後，欄位都一樣留白，再點一下OK，就又可以關閉Using DNS over HTTPS了...😂

title: [FR] Turn SMS Forwarding Off / Forward Notifications Only
author: beyond-far
body:
I use [SpamBlocker](https://github.com/aj3423/SpamBlocker) to block unwanted sms.
It does'nt act like a sms inbox app. instead, it just process sms notifications.
It works fine with required settings of turn the notifications from original sms app off.

but when work with telegram-sms, blocked sms (actually not deleted, just muted over the SpamBlocker's notifications ) still be forwarded.
maybe an option to turn sms listening off, so telegram-sms could only forwarding SpamBlocker's notifications ( via notification listener) ?

title: Duplicate Messages for Notification Forwarding
author: beyond-far
body:
[Receive Notification]
App: ********
Title: Unable to get message
Description: Unable to get message

repeated for 2-4 times at random

confirmed there's a normal app notification with valid information

--------

[Receive Notification]
App: ********
Title: Normal Notification
Description: Content

those notification with correct message also been sent 2 times
